Description: # Walk access time (WACC) (for all transit modes)

Expression: _SHORT_WALK / _WALK_SPEED * 60 # Constant assumption of short walk access

Description: # Walk egress time (WEGR) (for all transit modes)

Expression: _SHORT_WALK / _WALK_SPEED * 60 # Constant assumption of short walk egress
(_tnc_shared_mode * _hov3_dist) # Doesn't account for VMT savings from sharing
